channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: More dog poo, 1st July
item.description:
More dog poo in the alley joining Pincott Road with Latham road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Latham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven Pavement Causing Injuries, 1st July
item.description:
The edge of the Pavement somewhere outside 17-19 sandy Hill Road has dipped enough that, while trying to manoeuvre around the as of yet unresolved dangerous overgrown bushes along the road, slipped and twisted her ankle badly enough that we had to visit A&E.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe Overgrown Bushes blocking pavement., 1st July
item.description:
The bushes from the houses along Sandy Hill Road are dangerously overgrown and have been for months. It has gotten to the point where pedestrians (Mothers with prams, children, disabled people and all) are having to walk in the road just to get by, and given the dangerous traffic along this treet, it's only a matter of time before somebody gets seriously hurt. My partner ended up twisting her ankle this evening because of how far the bushes are pressing into the street and has to go to hospital. This needs to be dealt with.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These areas used to be maintained but have not been done since Clarion took over they said it’s Bromley Councils property, 1st July
item.description:
The areas are so not maintained and haven’t been done for years that it’s causing infestation aswell as being grossly unappealing. Cars are also being scratched when trying to park in the bays nearest to it and the whole area around it is just getting worse and worse. Something needs to be done and soon, can’t have windows open due to the amount of insects (some never seen before in this country) coming through the windows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trenholme Terrace, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: N76 reserve parking daily with cones, 1st July
item.description:
N 76 reserve parking every day with cones, sometimes he even takes up to 2 spaces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordsmead Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grove Vale-Bin outside chicken shop. Needs to emptied, 1st July
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning, 30th June
item.description:
Cradley rd and Beaverbank rd have not had the curb side/ gutters swept in months. Litter and debris building up and making the streets look unkempt. These roads are a rat runs with a high traffic and footfall and unfortunately people have forgotten what a bin looks like.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cradley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grove Vale (bin outside DIY shop) overflowing with waste., 30th June
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melbourne Grove (next to phone shop)-Bin overflowing with waste, 30th June
item.description:
Bins need to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer and brown wheelie bin, 30th June
item.description:
Fridge freezer and brown wheelie bin Lochmere close /brook Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lochmere Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th June
item.description:
Someone from the estate has dumped a fridge freezer on Beaverbank rd SE9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beaverbank Road, Eltham

item.title: Tell Grove- Bin overflowing with waste including dog waste, 30th June
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Tell Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Tell Grove- Notice Board broken, 30th June
item.description:
The notice board needs to be fixed or removed. Sharp pieces are exposed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Tell Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grove Vale (Litter bin outside Marks and Spencer) overflowing with waste, 30th June
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied. It is filled up with waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-22, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is spread across 50 yards of pavement multiple bags of rubbish, a TV, clothes and done furniture, 30th June
item.description:
Also just round the corner on wilberforce road ( heading north) there’s abandoned furnture
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridges, 30th June
item.description:
Fridges dumped beside tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Baker Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep hole almost middle of the road, 30th June
item.description:
This is a really dangerous hole. You can miss it when you turn out then your wheel goes down into it causing a distraction to you as a driver. I’ve reported this before yet it doesn’t appear as having been reported. Please fix it it’s a nasty hole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th June
item.description:
Fly tipping in the usual spot by No 4 the sublet HMO.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On Provost Road on the same side of the road opposite no 9/10, 30th June
item.description:
The Street light is not working (same issue further up the road but with street light on the other side has been reported just now)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eton Villas, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near 14 Downside Crescent, 30th June
item.description:
Two extremely large potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Downside Crescent, Belsize Park, Greater London
